member.name: T:Hazina.LLMs.Configuration.HazinaConfigBase
member.summary: Abstract base class for LLM provider configurations. Provides common functionality for API key, model, endpoint, and logging configuration. Reduces code duplication across 7+ provider config classes (~400 LOC reduction).

member.name: P:Hazina.LLMs.Configuration.HazinaConfigBase.ConfigurationSectionName
member.summary: Gets the configuration section name for this provider (e.g., "OpenAI", "Anthropic").

member.name: P:Hazina.LLMs.Configuration.HazinaConfigBase.DefaultEndpoint
member.summary: Gets the default endpoint URL for this provider.

member.name: P:Hazina.LLMs.Configuration.HazinaConfigBase.DefaultModel
member.summary: Gets the default model for this provider.

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.Configuration.HazinaConfigBase.Validate
member.summary: Validates the configuration and returns validation errors. Override to add provider-specific validation.

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.Configuration.HazinaConfigBase.ApplyDefaults
member.summary: Applies default values for properties that are not set. Called after binding from configuration.

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.Configuration.HazinaConfigBase.LoadFromConfiguration``1
member.summary: Loads configuration from appsettings.json using the provider's section name.

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.Configuration.HazinaConfigBase.LoadFromConfiguration``1(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Loads configuration from an IConfiguration instance.

member.name: T:Hazina.LLMs.Configuration.IProviderConfig
member.summary: Common interface for all LLM provider configurations. Enables generic factory patterns and reduces type-checking logic.

member.name: P:Hazina.LLMs.Configuration.IProviderConfig.ApiKey
member.summary: API key for authentication with the provider.

member.name: P:Hazina.LLMs.Configuration.IProviderConfig.Model
member.summary: Model identifier (e.g., "gpt-4o", "claude-3-5-sonnet", "gemini-1.5-pro").

member.name: P:Hazina.LLMs.Configuration.IProviderConfig.Endpoint
member.summary: Base endpoint URL for the provider API.

member.name: P:Hazina.LLMs.Configuration.IProviderConfig.LogPath
member.summary: Path for logging API interactions (optional).

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.Configuration.IProviderConfig.Validate
member.summary: Validates the configuration and returns any validation errors.

member.name: T:Hazina.LLMs.ILLMClient
member.summary: Core interface for interacting with Large Language Model (LLM) providers.

remarks.para: This interface abstracts the communication with various LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, etc.), providing a unified API for chat completions, embeddings, image generation, and text-to-speech.

Implementations include:
OpenAIClientWrapper - OpenAI GPT models
ClaudeClientWrapper - Anthropic Claude models
GeminiClientWrapper - Google Gemini models
OllamaClientWrapper - Local Ollama models

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.ILLMClient.GenerateEmbedding(System.String)
member.summary: Generates a vector embedding for the given text data.
member.param: The text to embed.
member.returns: An containing the vector representation of the input text.
member.remarks: Embeddings are used for semantic search, document similarity, and RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation). The embedding dimension depends on the model (e.g., 1536 for OpenAI text-embedding-ada-002).

example.code: var embedding = await llm.GenerateEmbedding("How does authentication work?"); // Use embedding.Vector for similarity calculations

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.ILLMClient.GetImage(System.String,HazinaChatResponseFormat,Hazina.LLMs.IToolsContext,System.Collections.Generic.List{ImageData},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Generates an image based on the given prompt.
member.param: The text description of the image to generate.
The desired response format.
Optional tools context for tool calling during generation.
Optional reference images for image-to-image generation.
Cancellation token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: An containing the generated image and token usage information.
member.exception: Thrown when the LLM provider does not support image generation.

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.ILLMClient.GetResponse(System.Collections.Generic.List{HazinaChatMessage},HazinaChatResponseFormat,Hazina.LLMs.IToolsContext,System.Collections.Generic.List{ImageData},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a chat conversation to the LLM and returns the response as a string.
member.param: The conversation history as a list of messages.
The desired response format (Text or JSON).
Optional tools context enabling function/tool calling.
Optional images to include in the conversation (for multimodal models).
Cancellation token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: An containing the response text and token usage information.

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.ILLMClient.GetResponse``1(System.Collections.Generic.List{HazinaChatMessage},Hazina.LLMs.IToolsContext,System.Collections.Generic.List{ImageData},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a chat conversation to the LLM and returns a strongly-typed response.
member.typeparam: The type to deserialize the response into. Must inherit from .
member.param: The conversation history as a list of messages.
Optional tools context enabling function/tool calling.
Optional images to include in the conversation (for multimodal models).
Cancellation token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: An containing the typed response and token usage information.
member.remarks: This method is useful for structured outputs where you expect the LLM to respond in a specific format. The LLM will be instructed to return JSON matching the schema of .

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.ILLMClient.GetResponseStream(System.Collections.Generic.List{HazinaChatMessage},System.Action{System.String},HazinaChatResponseFormat,Hazina.LLMs.IToolsContext,System.Collections.Generic.List{ImageData},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a chat conversation to the LLM with streaming response.
member.param: The conversation history as a list of messages.
Callback invoked for each text chunk received from the stream.
The desired response format.
Optional tools context enabling function/tool calling.
Optional images to include in the conversation (for multimodal models).
Cancellation token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: An containing the complete response text and token usage information.
member.remarks: Use this method for real-time UI updates where you want to display text as it's generated. The callback is called for each token/chunk received.

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.ILLMClient.GetResponseStream``1(System.Collections.Generic.List{HazinaChatMessage},System.Action{System.String},Hazina.LLMs.IToolsContext,System.Collections.Generic.List{ImageData},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a chat conversation to the LLM with streaming and returns a strongly-typed response.
member.typeparam: The type to deserialize the response into. Must inherit from .
member.param: The conversation history as a list of messages.
Callback invoked for each text chunk received from the stream.
Optional tools context enabling function/tool calling.
Optional images to include in the conversation (for multimodal models).
Cancellation token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: An containing the typed response and token usage information.

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.ILLMClient.SpeakStream(System.String,System.String,System.Action{System.Byte[]},System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Converts text to speech and streams the audio bytes.
member.param: The text to convert to speech.
The voice identifier to use (provider-specific, e.g., "alloy", "echo", "nova" for OpenAI).
Callback invoked for each audio chunk received.
The desired audio MIME type (e.g., "audio/mpeg", "audio/opus").
Cancellation token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that completes when all audio has been streamed.
member.exception: Thrown when the LLM provider does not support text-to-speech.

member.name: P:Hazina.LLMs.IToolsContext.OnToolExecuted
member.summary: Optional callback invoked after each tool execution. Parameters: toolName, toolResult, turnNumber

member.name: P:Hazina.LLMs.IToolsContext.ShouldContinue
member.summary: Optional callback to determine if the agentic loop should continue after a non-tool response. Parameters: currentResponse, turnNumber Returns: true to inject continuation prompt, false to stop Default behavior (when null): stop on non-tool response

member.name: P:Hazina.LLMs.IToolsContext.ContinuationPrompt
member.summary: Optional prompt to inject when ShouldContinue returns true. This prompts the model to continue working on the task.

member.name: P:Hazina.LLMs.IToolsContext.MaxContinuations
member.summary: Maximum number of continuation prompts to inject (prevents infinite loops). Default: 5

member.name: T:Hazina.LLMs.PromptBasedToolsOrchestrator
member.summary: Provides prompt-engineering based tool calling for LLM models that don't support native function calling. Works with any ILLMClient implementation by converting tools to text descriptions and parsing JSON responses.
member.remarks: This orchestrator enables tool/function calling for models without native support (e.g., phi3, llama3, older models). It works by: 1. Generating a system prompt that describes available tools in human-readable format 2. Instructing the model to respond with JSON when it wants to call a tool 3. Detecting JSON tool call responses and executing the corresponding tool 4. Feeding tool results back to the model and continuing the conversation 5. Repeating until the model provides a final answer (max iterations configurable)

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.PromptBasedToolsOrchestrator.#ctor(System.Int32,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Hazina.LLMs.PromptBasedToolsOrchestrator})
member.summary: Creates a new instance of PromptBasedToolsOrchestrator
member.param: Maximum number of tool calls allowed in a single conversation (default: 50)
Optional logger for diagnostic output

member.summary: Orchestrates tool calling for a non-streaming LLM request
member.param: Conversation messages
Tools context with available tools
Function to call the underlying LLM (without tools)
Cancellation token
member.returns: Final LLM response after all tool calls are completed

member.summary: Orchestrates tool calling for a streaming LLM request
member.param: Conversation messages
Tools context with available tools
Function to call the underlying LLM with streaming (without tools)
Callback for each chunk received
Cancellation token
member.returns: Final LLM response after all tool calls are completed

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.PromptBasedToolsOrchestrator.GenerateToolsSystemPrompt(Hazina.LLMs.IToolsContext)
member.summary: Generates a system prompt that describes available tools for models without native tool support. The model is instructed to respond with JSON when it wants to call a tool.

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.PromptBasedToolsOrchestrator.IsToolCallResponse(System.String,Hazina.LLMs.PromptToolCall@)
member.summary: Detects if the model response is a tool call request.

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.PromptBasedToolsOrchestrator.ExecuteToolCallAsync(Hazina.LLMs.IToolsContext,System.Collections.Generic.List{HazinaChatMessage},Hazina.LLMs.PromptToolCall,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a tool call and returns the result.

member.name: T:Hazina.LLMs.PromptToolCall
member.summary: Model for prompt-based tool call requests (for models without native tool support)

member.name: T:Hazina.LLMs.Providers.LLMProviderBase`1
member.summary: Abstract base class for LLM provider client implementations. Provides common HTTP client functionality, retry logic, and error handling. Reduces boilerplate code across 8 provider implementations (~300 LOC reduction).
member.typeparam: The configuration type for this provider.

member.name: P:Hazina.LLMs.Providers.LLMProviderBase`1.Config
member.summary: The provider configuration.

member.name: P:Hazina.LLMs.Providers.LLMProviderBase`1.Http
member.summary: Shared HTTP client for API calls.

member.name: F:Hazina.LLMs.Providers.LLMProviderBase`1.JsonOptions
member.summary: JSON serializer options for request/response handling.

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.Providers.LLMProviderBase`1.#ctor(`0)
member.summary: Creates a new provider instance with the specified configuration.

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.Providers.LLMProviderBase`1.CreateHttpClientInternal
member.summary: Internal method to create HttpClient without virtual call in constructor.

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.Providers.LLMProviderBase`1.CreateHttpClient
member.summary: Creates and configures the HTTP client for this provider. Note: Not used in constructor to avoid virtual method call. Use CreateHttpClientInternal for initialization.

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.Providers.LLMProviderBase`1.ConfigureHttpClient(System.Net.Http.HttpClient)
member.summary: Configures the HTTP client with authentication headers. Override to add provider-specific headers.

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.Providers.LLMProviderBase`1.PostJsonAsync``2(System.String,``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a POST request with JSON content and deserializes the response.

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.Providers.LLMProviderBase`1.PostStreamAsync``1(System.String,``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a POST request and returns the raw response stream for SSE handling.

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.Providers.LLMProviderBase`1.ExecuteWithRetryAsync``1(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes an operation with retry logic for transient failures.

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.Providers.LLMProviderBase`1.IsTransientError(System.Net.Http.HttpRequestException)
member.summary: Determines if an HTTP error is transient and should be retried.

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.Providers.LLMProviderBase`1.Log(System.String)
member.summary: Logs API interactions if a log path is configured.

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.Providers.LLMProviderBase`1.BuildJsonFormatInstruction``1
member.summary: Builds the JSON format instruction for structured output.

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.Providers.LLMProviderBase`1.CreateTokenUsage(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a token usage info object from input/output counts.
